nasb.text: And Jesus *said to them, “How many loaves do you have?” And they said, “Seven, and a few small fish.”

esv.text: And Jesus said to them, “How many loaves do you have?” They said, “Seven, and a few small fish.”

cnv.text: 耶穌問他們：“你們有多少餅？”他們說：“七個餅和幾條小魚。”

ccb.text: 耶稣问：“你们有多少饼？” 门徒答道：“七个，还有几条小鱼。”

csbs.text: 耶稣问他们：“你们有多少饼？” 他们回答说：“七个，还有几条小鱼。”
